From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Jungle Fight MMA events in 2006

| Jungle Fight Europe | |
| --- | --- |
| Promotion | [Jungle Fight](/wiki/Jungle_Fight "Jungle Fight") |
| Date | December 17, 2006 |
| Venue | [Tivoli Hall](/wiki/Tivoli_Hall "Tivoli Hall") |
| City | [Slovenia](/wiki/Slovenia "Slovenia") [Ljubljana, Slovenia](/wiki/Ljubljana,_Slovenia "Ljubljana, Slovenia") |

***Jungle Fight Europe***, also known as ***Jungle Fight 7*** was a [mixed martial arts](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") event held by [Jungle Fight](/wiki/Jungle_Fight "Jungle Fight") on December 17, 2006 at [Tivoli Hall](/wiki/Tivoli_Hall "Tivoli Hall") in [Ljubljana, Slovenia](/wiki/Ljubljana,_Slovenia "Ljubljana, Slovenia"). To date, it is the only Jungle Fight event outside of Brazil.
